name: Quinceañera Consultation
description: 60-minute planning session for your Quinceañera. We cover venue, vendors, theme, timeline, and budget. Bring your ideas — I'll bring the checklist.

name: Vendor Meeting
description: 30-minute call with florists, caterers, photographers, and other vendors. Used for quotes, confirmations, and logistics check-ins.

name: Milestone Event Consultation
description: 60-minute consultation for baptisms, graduations, anniversaries, and other milestone celebrations.

name: Quick Follow-Up
description: Retired — used 15-min slot for day-of confirmations. Now handled by text.
